description: Lithium Plating parameters. Model from Hein, Simon and Danner, Timo and Latz, Arnulf. In An electrochemical model of lithium plating and stripping in lithium ion batteries, ACS Applied Energy Materials (2020)

symmetryFactorPlating.description: Symmetry factor for lithium plating/stripping reaction (typically ≈ 0.3)

symmetryFactorChemicalIntercalation.description: Symmetry factor for charge-neutral chemical intercalation of plated lithium

reactionRatePlating.description: Reaction rate constant for lithium plating

reactionRateChemicalIntercalation.description: Reaction rate constant for chemical intercalation of plated lithium

reactionRateDirectIntercalation.description: Reaction rate constant for direct lithium-ion intercalation into graphite

thresholdParameter.description: Phenomenological parameter: minimum lithium amount needed to activate metal activity (see eqn (8))

limitAmount.description: Limit amount of plated lithium corresponding to one monolayer on graphite surface (see eqn (26))

platedReferenceConcentration.description: Reference concentration for plated lithium [mol/m^3]. The value is used in the computation for normalization. If not given, a default one will be computed

platedLiMonolayerThickness.description: Thickness of one monolayer of plated lithium around a particle [m]. See equation (S-3)

volumetricSurfaceArea.description: Interfacial surface area between graphite and electrolyte per unit volume [m²/m³]

particleRadius.description: Radius of graphite particles, used in solid-state diffusion modeling
